problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Quantum. Quantum tunneling through energy barrier directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
